MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff J.G. Devdhara dba Oakwood Hotel and K. Miranda are present in Pro Per.
Defendant Joseph Warren is present.
Attorney Omar P. Calimbas representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of July-02-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
